title: Sins of Pompeii
writer: Alexandre Arnoux, Pierre Brive, Edward George Bulwer-Lytton
actors: Micheline Presle, Georges Marchal, Marcel Herrand
plot: In the town of Pompeii, 79 A.D., a few weeks before the volcanic eruption of Vesuvius, a Roman lady Hélène meets and falls in love with a young Greek man Lysias. He is betrothed to another woman who, to win him back, acquires a po...
